title: MTR Mod Language Fixes
description: A Resource pack that changes some of the terminology in MTR mod, but most importantly, removing the redundant station suffix.
body:
Removes the MTR Station Suffix.

![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0b364401e06c35cf7ff8ad6b8ca123d556406e5.png)

![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3051dfb0187f730a92879216af437dfb4fe1830.png)

![Station Name in Dashboard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/399ab1d76e874e0f9afd79a656f3e6435f8fdb56.png)
